chunks.text: Technical Reports - Alexei (Alyosha) Efros. Deep Generative Priors for View Synthesis at Scale (EECS-2025-170) by Hang Gao, Angjoo Kanazawa, Jitendra Malik, Alexei (Alyosha) Efros and Shubham Tulsiani. Test-Time Training on Video Streams (EECS-2025-167) by Ren Wang. Scaling Properties of Diffusion Models for Perceptual Tasks (EECS-2025-38) by Zeeshan Patel, Rahul Ravishankar, Jathushan Rajasegaran and Jitendra Malik. Extending Data Priors Across Domains with Diffusion Distillation (EECS-2024-177) by David McAllister. Automated Tree Censusing from Aerial Imagery with Noisy Supervision (EECS-2024-81) by Sandeep Mukherjee.

Analyzing 18th-20th Century Art and Music with Contrastive Cross-Modal Learning (EECS-2020-160) by Vivien Nguyen. A Tool for Computational Analysis of Narrative Film (EECS-2018-102) by Alexei (Alyosha) Efros, Frederick Alexander Hall and Maneesh Agrawala. Fighting Fake News: Image Splice Detection via Learned Self-Consistency (EECS-2018-67) by Minyoung Huh, Andrew Liu, Andrew Owens and Alexei (Alyosha) Efros. Scalable High-Quality 3D Scanning (EECS-2016-220) by Karthik Narayan, Pieter Abbeel, Jitendra Malik, Alexei (Alyosha) Efros and Martin Banks.

Post-Post-Modern Photography: Capture-Time Perceptual Matching For More Faithful Photographs (EECS-2016-167) by Rachel Albert and Alexei (Alyosha) Efros. Occlusion-aware Depth Estimation Using Light-field Cameras (EECS-2015-222) by Ting-Chun Wang, Alexei (Alyosha) Efros and Ravi Ramamoorthi. Unified Multi-Cue Depth Estimation from Light-Field Images: Correspondence, Defocus, Shading, and Specularity (EECS-2015-174) by Michael Tao. Video Based Motion Synthesis by Splicing and Morphing (CSD-04-1337) by Greg Mori, Alex Berg, Alyosha Efros, Ashley Eden and Jitendra Malik.
